message:
🐛 Remove card-level Diagnose from LLM-d Stack Monitor (#669)

Diagnose and Repair actions should only appear at the individual item
level, not at the card level. Remove the WorkloadMonitorDiagnose
component from the bottom of the card while keeping the per-item
diagnose/repair buttons on unhealthy items.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
